docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF STEVEN BARWISE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CAROLINE GOODRICH. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS FROM TASKRABBIT IN THE CASE FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARWISE, STEVEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARWISE, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODRICH, CAROLINE $790.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $790.00 FILED BY BARWISE, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT GOODRICH, CAROLINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED AUG-07-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOODRICH, CAROLINE
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO TASK ROBBIT, 425 2ND # 5 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94107
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - FILED AT INSISTANCE OF LITIGANT
